name: Partial Gaussian sums and the Pólya--Vinogradov inequality for primitive characters
title: Partial Gaussian sums and the Pólya--Vinogradov inequality for primitive characters
abstract: Gives explicit Pólya–Vinogradov constants for primitive characters via partial Gaussian sums and a Burgess-like convolution estimate.
findings: Downloaded for the character-sum comparison. Its applicability to the centered reciprocal phase has not yet been determined.
